zh.lifeSummary: 當Marcella De Thweng於1336年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾爾姆斯利時，她的父親Marmaduke Thweng26歲，母親Agnes Northwode26歲。她和Lord William Hesketh至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1379年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾盧福德享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Marcella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of Marcellus; see Marcel . St Marcella was a Roman noblewoman of the late 4th century who lodged St Jerome for three years.

en.lifeSummary: When Marcella De Thweng was born in 1336, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Marmaduke Thweng, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Northwode, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lord William Hesketh. She died in 1379, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marcella De Thweng est née en 1336, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Marmaduke Thweng, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Northwode, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lord William Hesketh. Elle est décédée en 1379, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, Unit: Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marcella De Thweng 1336 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Marmaduke Thweng 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Northwode 26. Sie hatte mit Lord William Hesketh mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1379 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marcella De Thweng è nata il nel 1336 nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Marmaduke Thweng, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Northwode, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lord William Hesketh. Morì nel 1379, nel Rufford, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marcella De Thwengが1336年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Marmaduke Thwengは26歳，母Agnes Northwodeは26歳であった。彼女はLord William Heskethとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1379年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marcella De Thweng(이)가 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Marmaduke Thweng(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Northwode(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Lord William Hesketh(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marcella De Thweng nasceu em 1336, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Marmaduke Thweng, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Northwode, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lord William Hesketh. Ela faleceu em 1379, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marcella De Thweng родилась в 1336 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Marmaduke Thweng было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Northwode, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lord William Hesketh. Она умерла в 1379 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marcella De Thweng nació en 1336, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Marmaduke Thweng, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Northwode, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lord William Hesketh. Murió en 1379, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
